summary: Portfolio Analytics Module fully tested. Fixed 1 backend bug (Decimal * float type error in scenario comparison). All 36 backend API tests passed (100%). All 4 frontend tabs verified: Dashboard, Holdings, Scenarios, Reports. Portfolio selector works correctly. All features working as expected.

issues: Recharts warning about width(-1) and height(-1) on initial load - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after data loads

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed Decimal * float type error in portfolio_analytics_engine.py line 614-615 in compare_scenarios method - converted float multipliers to Decimal type
seed_data_creation: Sample portfolios use consistent UUIDs: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000101 (Core Real Estate Fund I), 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000102 (Value-Add Opportunity Fund II), 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000103 (Green Building REIT)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio Analytics Module fully implemented and tested. Uses IN-MEMORY sample data (MOCKED - not from real DB) - this is intentional per design. The module has 4 tabs: Dashboard, Holdings, Scenarios, Reports. All APIs working correctly. Frontend URL: /portfolio-analytics accessible from sidebar. Test portfolios (TEST_*) created during testing are visible in dropdown.
passed_tests: Portfolio Analytics page loads at /portfolio-analytics route
Dashboard tab: Shows KPI cards (Total Portfolio Value, Properties, Avg Risk Score, VaR 95%, Stranded Assets, GRESB Score, Certified %, Portfolio Yield)
Dashboard tab: Shows Sector Allocation pie chart
Dashboard tab: Shows Geographic Distribution bar chart
Dashboard tab: Shows Risk Distribution bar chart
Dashboard tab: Shows Alerts & Notifications (Stranded Asset Risk, High Sector Concentration)
Holdings tab: Shows property table with 5 properties
Holdings tab: Search functionality filters by name/location/type
Holdings tab: Table shows Property, Type, Value, Income, Ownership, Gain/Loss columns
Scenarios tab: Shows 5 scenario options (Optimistic Growth, Recession Stress, Climate Transition, Green Premium, Rising Rates)
Scenarios tab: Scenario selection checkboxes work
Scenarios tab: Compare Scenarios button works
Scenarios tab: Shows Best/Worst scenario comparison results
Scenarios tab: Shows comparison bar chart
Scenarios tab: Shows comparison table with Value, Change, Stranded, VaR 95% columns
Reports tab: Report type dropdown works (Valuation, Climate Risk, Sustainability, TCFD, Investor, Executive)
Reports tab: Generate Report button works
Reports tab: Shows generated report with Executive Summary
Portfolio Selector: Dropdown shows all portfolios with property counts
Portfolio Selector: Switching portfolios updates all dashboard data
Portfolio Selector: Shows portfolio details (type, strategy, properties, value, target return)

mocked_apis_list: Portfolio data stored in-memory using Python dictionaries (_portfolios_store, _holdings_store)
Sample portfolios auto-initialized on module load via init_sample_data()
Holdings data hardcoded in get_sample_holdings() function
Report data stored in _reports_store dictionary, not persisted to database

portfolio_analytics.returns: Portfolio summary, risk metrics, stranding analysis, sustainability metrics, concentration analysis

scenario_comparison.returns: Comparison table, best/worst scenarios, value spread, insights

holdings.returns: Property list with values, income, gain/loss

bugs_fixed.root_cause: TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for *: 'decimal.Decimal' and 'float' in compare_scenarios method
bugs_fixed.fix: Converted float multipliers (0.5, 0.3) to Decimal type before multiplication with value_at_risk_95 and weighted_avg_risk_score
